title: pv

messages.description: message to store and share by other [pv] objects

methods.description: posts information in the Pd window about related [pv] objects in the patch

body: [pv] is similar to pd's [value], but stores any message as a variable name, which can be shared within a patch or its subpatch if it has another [pv] object with the same variable name. It won't share with other patches!
